name: M&F Bank - Charlotte, NC
description_short: M&F Bank is a community-focused bank with a Charlotte, NC branch offering personal and business banking services, including checking, savings, loans, and SBA financing.
description_long:
M&F Bank operates as a community-focused financial institution with over a century of history in community-based banking. The Charlotte, NC location at 101 Beatties Ford Rd. serves both personal and business customers in the region. The bank emphasizes relationship-driven banking rather than transactional finance, positioning itself as a local partner invested in the community's growth.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal banking services including checking accounts, savings accounts, CDs, Health Savings Accounts, personal loans, auto loans, home equity lines of credit, and personal credit cards with uChoose Rewards. For business customers, M&F Bank provides business checking, business savings, SBA loans (7(a) and 504 programs), business credit cards, and cash management services. Digital banking options include online banking, mobile apps for both personal and business accounts, bill pay, and Zelle transfers. The Charlotte branch is managed by Kim McKenney and can be reached at (704) 332-2121.

What distinguishes M&F Bank is its emphasis on small business support through specialized SBA lending programs and its Empowering Growth Small Business Grant program, which provides funding to small businesses in the Charlotte community. The bank also offers wealth management services including financial planning, college savings planning, retirement income planning, and insurance planning through its wealth division. The routing number for the Charlotte location is 053100452.

As a traditional community bank, M&F Bank serves customers seeking relationship-based banking with local decision-making, though customers should verify current product offerings and rates directly. The bank's focus on small business lending and community investment makes it particularly relevant for entrepreneurs and long-term community members, though availability of specific products may vary by location or individual circumstances.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: SBA lending programs (7(a) and 504 loans) specifically designed for small business expansion and commercial real estate
Empowering Growth Small Business Grant program providing direct funding to local small businesses
24/7 digital banking access including mobile apps, online banking, and remote deposit capabilities
Comprehensive wealth management services including financial planning, retirement planning, and investment/brokerage accounts
Over a century of community banking history with emphasis on relationship-based rather than transactional service
Full suite of personal loan products including home equity lines of credit and personal loans for life milestones
Local branch management with named branch manager (Kim McKenney) available for personalized service
cons: Limited branch network (only one Charlotte location mentioned) may not provide convenience for customers outside the immediate area
Website does not display current interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules for comparison purposes
No specific information about minimum balance requirements, account maintenance fees, or loan term options
best_for: Small business owners seeking SBA financing and local relationship-based lending decisions
Charlotte-area residents wanting community-focused banking with local decision-making authority
Individuals interested in comprehensive financial planning and wealth management services alongside basic banking
diagnosis: M&F Bank is best for small business owners and Charlotte-area residents seeking traditional community banking with relationship-based service and SBA lending expertise. The main caveat is that the bank appears to have limited branch availability and lacks transparent public pricing information, so customers should contact the Charlotte branch directly to confirm product availability, rates, and fees before opening accounts.
services: Personal credit cards with uChoose Rewards
Online and mobile banking for personal and business accounts
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
